form.label: SENTINEL Case Details
form.description: Deep-dive view into a single autonomous investigation — full chain-of-thought, blast radius, actions taken, and manual override controls. Reached primarily via drilldown from the War Room case queue. Auto-refreshes every 10 seconds while the case is active.

search.query: index=sentinel_cases case_id=$case_id$ | head 1 | eval risk_pct=round(risk_score,0) | table case_id status resolution risk_score risk_pct alert_type host

panel.title: 🚨 CASE HEADER — $case_id$
panel.description: At-a-glance case identity, lifecycle status, composite risk score, and the two manual-override controls every SOC analyst needs within reach: HALT (freeze the pipeline immediately) and FORCE ESCALATE (hand the case to a human now, bypassing autonomy).

panel.title: 📊 EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
panel.description: Sherlock's plain-language synthesis of the investigation — what happened, why it matters, and what SENTINEL concluded. This is the line a CISO reads first.

search.query: index=sentinel_cases case_id=$case_id$ | head 1 | spath input=sherlock_report path=executive_summary output=executive_summary | table executive_summary | rename executive_summary as "Executive Summary"

panel.title: 🤖 INVESTIGATION TIMELINE
panel.description: Chronological feed of every agent decision recorded to sentinel_audit for this case — confidence and reasoning included. Rows are color-coded by the agent that made the call: Vanguard (blue), Sherlock (purple), Executor (red), Sage (green).

search.query: index=sentinel_audit case_id=$case_id$ event_type=decision | sort _time | table _time, agent_name, decision_type, confidence, reasoning | rename _time as Time, agent_name as Agent, decision_type as Decision, confidence as Confidence, reasoning as Reasoning

panel.title: 📊 CHAIN OF THOUGHT
panel.description: The complete, unedited explainability trace — every observation→inference step that led each agent to its conclusion — rendered as raw JSON exactly as it was written to sentinel_audit, for full forensic transparency.

panel.title: 🤖 AGENT REASONING
panel.description: Every agent's reasoning chain flattened into observation→inference pairs with the confidence score attached at each step — the audit-grade detail behind the executive summary above.

search.query: index=sentinel_audit case_id=$case_id$ event_type=chain_of_thought | eval chain_json_raw=tojson(chain) | head 1 | eval chain_json=chain_json_raw | fields chain_json

condition.set: { "note": "No chain-of-thought recorded yet for this case." }

panel.title: 🤖 AGENT REASONING — STEP BY STEP
panel.description: Same chain-of-thought data, flattened into a sortable table of observation→inference pairs per agent and per step — useful for scanning long investigations without parsing raw JSON.

search.query: index=sentinel_audit case_id=$case_id$ event_type=chain_of_thought | spath path=chain{} | mvexpand chain{} | spath input=chain{} output=step path=step | spath input=chain{} output=observation path=observation | spath input=chain{} output=inference path=inference | table agent_name, step, observation, inference, confidence | rename agent_name as Agent, step as Step, observation as Observation, inference as Inference, confidence as Confidence

panel.title: 🚨 BLAST RADIUS
panel.description: Sherlock's lateral-movement assessment — every host, user, and service this incident touched or threatened to touch. The scope that decides whether this stays autonomous or escalates to a human.

search.query: index=sentinel_cases case_id=$case_id$ | head 1 | spath input=sherlock_report | eval compromised_hosts=mvjoin('blast_radius.compromised_hosts{}', ", ") | eval targeted_hosts=mvjoin('blast_radius.targeted_hosts{}', ", ") | eval compromised_users=mvjoin('blast_radius.compromised_users{}', ", ") | eval affected_services=mvjoin('blast_radius.affected_services{}', ", ") | table compromised_hosts, targeted_hosts, compromised_users, affected_services | rename compromised_hosts as "Compromised Hosts", targeted_hosts as "Targeted Hosts", compromised_users as "Compromised Users", affected_services as "Affected Services"

panel.title: ⚡ ACTIONS TAKEN
panel.description: Every containment or eradication action Executor fired for this case — target, outcome, post-action verification, and the rollback timer attached for reversible actions. Status is color-coded: success (green), failed (red), skipped (yellow).

search.query: index=sentinel_audit case_id=$case_id$ event_type=action | rename rollback_timer_hours as rollback_timer | table _time, action_type, target, status, verification_result, rollback_timer | rename _time as Time, action_type as Action, target as Target, status as Status, verification_result as "Verification Result", rollback_timer as "Rollback Timer (hrs)"
